ops.text: {"config":{"cell":"step0_base_model","considered":{"Gemma-4-E4B (Apr 2026)":"rejected - small dense variant is elastic effective-params (MatFormer) arch, not a plain dense checkpoint; complicates clean LoRA+MLX; has thinking mode to disable","Mistral-7B / Ministral":"rejected - older instruction-following, weaker than Qwen3 at code-adjacent text","OLMo-3-Instruct-7B (2026)":"rejected - reasoning-line post-train, larger/slower at 7B, MLX conversion less battle-tested for this constrained-output task","Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507":"PICKED - non-thinking by design (no <think> blocks to suppress), first-class mlx-lm arch, exact-checkpoint mlx-community 4bit conversion + published LoRA adapters, 256K ctx, strong coding/instruction-following, fast to train/serve at 4B on M4 Max 128GB","SmolLM3-3B":"rejected - edge-focused, lower capability ceiling"},"decision":"Qwen/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507","mlx_id":"mlx-community/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507-4bit","quant":"4bit-QLoRA","seed":1729,"sources":["https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507","https://huggingface.co/mlx-community/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507-4bit","https://huggingface.co/mlx-community/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507-4bit-DWQ-2510","https://allenai.org/blog/olmo3","https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct","https://www.labellerr.com/blog/gemma-4-12b-run-locally-and-fine-tune/","https://markaicode.com/run-fine-tune-llms-mac-mlx-lm/"],"verification":"HF config.json resolves (HTTP 307 to LFS CDN) for both Qwen/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 and mlx-community/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507-4bit; mlx-community 4bit converted from the base with mlx-lm 0.26.2 (loads under our 0.31.3)"},"config_hash":"08b7bdc21390","dataset_digest":"n/a-step0","experiment":"E2-cascade","metrics":{},"seed":1729,"verdict":"STEP-0: base = Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 (mlx-community 4bit, QLoRA). Confirms prior pick over 2026 entrants: decisive on non-thinking-by-design (Gemma 4 / OLMo 3 are reasoning lines whose thinking must be disabled and can leak) and on mlx-lm ecosystem maturity (exact-checkpoint 4bit + published adapters). Gemma 4 small dense is the elastic E4B MatFormer arch, not a plain dense checkpoint."}
